definition: JPY carry unwind transmits to EM high-beta currencies with a 2-5 trading day lag at 1.5-2.0x magnitude. August 2024 data: USD/JPY moved July 31-August 5; EM high-beta (ZAR -7%, BRL -5%, MXN -8%) peaked August 5-7. Mechanism operates through margin calls triggering EM carry liquidation then stop-loss cascades.
evidence: August 2024 sequencing: USD/JPY July 31-Aug 5, EM peaks Aug 5-7
Margin call → EM carry liquidation → stop-loss cascade mechanism
Operationally valuable but n=1 for precise sequencing
open_questions: Is the 2-5 day lag stable across different market structure regimes?
Does the 1.5-2.0x magnitude hold for smaller JPY moves?
How does EM reserve adequacy affect contagion magnitude?
